handoff_notes: DTS-1685 was reviewed as a duplicate/canceled Gmail triage issue rather than an open product defect.
Root cause and a Cursor agent prompt template were documented in docs/linear-triage/DTS-1685-root-cause-prompt.md.
No Linear/Composio write tools were available in this environment, so issue comments/status updates and agent launch could not be performed directly.
If connected MCP tools are available in a follow-up environment, add the suggested Linear comment and launch the prompt template through Composio/Cursor.
